pr.title: Non-Record: SLOT Eval-Time Augmentation on PR #549 SOTA Stack

output.summary: Eval-time SLOT optimizes a 512-d delta on TTT hidden states inside the scoring loop to refine logits just before BPB scoring.
techniques: Per-batch 512-d SLOT delta optimized via AdamW on TTT hidden states
Split forward_hidden/compute_logits to insert SLOT into eval Phase 1
Freeze base weights so SLOT adjustments stay score-first compliant
